name: Nike Dri-FIT Legend Men's Training T-Shirt
overview_desc: Moisture-wicking fabric designed to keep you cool during intense workouts.

product_page.description: The Nike Dri-FIT T-Shirt is made with lightweight, sweat-wicking fabric to help keep you dry and comfortable from your first set to your last.
product_page.feature_resolution: Dri-FIT Technology, Odor-Resistant Finish, Standard Fit.

name: Adidas AeroReady Essentials Logo Tee
overview_desc: A classic crewneck tee built for daily comfort and performance.

product_page.description: This Adidas training t-shirt manages moisture so you stay dry. The iconic badge of sport on the chest adds a timeless touch to your athletic look.
product_page.feature_resolution: AeroReady Fabric, Recycled Content, Crewneck.

name: Levi's Men's Trucker Denim Jacket
overview_desc: The original denim jacket since 1967, a symbol of self-expression.

product_page.description: Our original Trucker Jacket is a classic. It features a point collar, front button placket, and button-flap chest pockets. It only gets better with wear.
product_page.feature_resolution: 100% Cotton, Non-Stretch, Side Hem Adjusters.

reviews.comment: A timeless piece that goes with everything.

name: Zara Linen Blend Casual Shirt
overview_desc: Breathable linen blend shirt perfect for a relaxed, stylish look.

product_page.description: Shirt made of a linen and cotton blend. Featuring a regular fit, spread collar, and long sleeves with buttoned cuffs.
product_page.feature_resolution: Linen-Cotton Blend, Regular Fit, Easy-Iron.

name: Outfitters Graphic Printed T-Shirt
overview_desc: Streetwear-inspired graphic tee with a modern oversized fit.

product_page.description: Crafted from soft jersey fabric, this tee features high-density screen printing on the chest and back for an edgy aesthetic.
product_page.feature_resolution: Oversized Fit, 100% Cotton, Graphic Print.

name: Nike Sportswear Club Fleece Hoodie
overview_desc: A wardrobe staple that combines classic style with soft comfort.

product_page.description: Brushed-back fleece fabric feels soft and smooth against the skin. Featuring an adjustable hood and kangaroo pocket.
product_page.feature_resolution: Brushed-back Fleece, Ribbed Cuffs, Adjustable Drawstring.

name: Adidas 3-Stripes French Terry Sweatshirt
overview_desc: Cozy sweatshirt featuring the iconic 3-stripes down the sleeves.

product_page.description: A classic pullover made from soft French terry. This sweatshirt is designed for relaxing after a long workout or casual outings.
product_page.feature_resolution: French Terry, Regular Fit, Ribbed Crewneck.

name: Levi's 511 Slim Fit Men's Jeans
overview_desc: A modern slim with room to move, perfect for an everyday look.

product_page.description: Between a skinny and a straight fit, these jeans are slim through the thigh and leg opening for a long, lean look.
product_page.feature_resolution: Stretch Denim, Zip Fly, 5-Pocket Styling.

name: Zara Textured Formal Shirt
overview_desc: Sharp formal shirt with a textured weave for professional attire.

product_page.description: Slim fit shirt featuring a high-quality cotton construction. Italian collar and long sleeves with double cuffs.
product_page.feature_resolution: 100% Cotton, Slim Fit, Easy-Care.

name: Outfitters Urban Street Hoodie
overview_desc: Contemporary street-style hoodie with a comfortable fleece lining.

product_page.description: Designed for the urban explorer, this hoodie features a unique panelled design and a spacious front pocket.
product_page.feature_resolution: Fleece Lined, Relaxed Fit, Durable Ribbing.

name: Nike Air Force 1 '07
overview_desc: The radiance lives on in the basketball original with crisp leather and stitched overlays.

product_page.description: Crossing hardwood comfort with off-court flair, it features Nike Air cushioning and a durable rubber outsole for all-day wear.
product_page.feature_resolution: Full-grain Leather, Air-Sole Unit, Padded Collar.

reviews.comment: The cleanest shoes in my collection.

name: Adidas Ultraboost Light
overview_desc: Experience epic energy with the lightest Ultraboost ever.

product_page.description: Featuring a Light BOOST midsole and a Primeknit+ upper, these shoes provide incredible responsiveness and a sock-like fit for long-distance runs.
product_page.feature_resolution: Light BOOST Midsole, Continental™ Rubber Outsole, Sustainable Materials.

name: Nike Pegasus 40 Running Shoes
overview_desc: A springy ride for every run, the Peg's familiar, just-for-you feel returns.

product_page.description: The Pegasus 40 offers neutral support and highly responsive React technology for a smooth transition from heel to toe.
product_page.feature_resolution: Nike React Foam, Dual Zoom Air Units, Engineered Mesh.

name: Adidas Originals Stan Smith Shoes
overview_desc: Timeless appeal and effortless style defined by the green heel tab.

product_page.description: Originally made for tennis, this minimalist sneaker has become a fashion staple. Features a smooth synthetic upper and perforated 3-stripes.
product_page.feature_resolution: Vegan Upper, OrthoLite® Sockliner, Minimalist Design.

name: Bata Ambassador Oxford Shoes
overview_desc: Classic genuine leather oxfords for a sharp professional look.

product_page.description: A must-have for every gentleman’s wardrobe. These formal shoes feature a polished finish and a cushioned insole for comfort during office hours.
product_page.feature_resolution: Genuine Leather, Lace-up Closure, Durable Sole.

reviews.comment: Very comfortable for daily office use.

name: Fossil Machine Three-Hand Brown Leather Watch
overview_desc: Rugged design meets classic style with an industrial-inspired bezel.

product_page.description: This 42mm watch features a black dial with a date window and a genuine brown leather strap that ages beautifully over time.
product_page.feature_resolution: Quartz Movement, 5 ATM Water Resistance, Interchangeable Straps.

name: Casio G-Shock DW5600 Digital Watch
overview_desc: The ultimate tough watch for extreme environments and daily utility.

product_page.description: The original square G-Shock design. Shock resistant, 200m water resistant, and features an EL backlight with Afterglow.
product_page.feature_resolution: Shock Resistant, Multi-function Alarm, 2-Year Battery.

name: Ray-Ban Classic Aviator Sunglasses
overview_desc: The world's most iconic sunglass model, designed for aviators in 1937.

product_page.description: Features G-15 polarized lenses that provide a high level of clarity and protection from harmful UV rays. Metal frames with a gold finish.
product_page.feature_resolution: Polarized Lenses, 100% UV Protection, Metal Frame.

reviews.comment: Simply the best sunglasses ever made.

name: Premium Leather Reversible Belt
overview_desc: A versatile 2-in-1 leather belt for formal and casual outfits.

product_page.description: Crafted from top-grain leather, this belt features a twist buckle that allows you to switch between Black and Tan sides easily.
product_page.feature_resolution: Reversible Design, Genuine Leather, Polished Nickel Buckle.

name: Men's Premium Leather Bifold Wallet
overview_desc: Handcrafted bifold wallet with RFID protection.

product_page.description: Keep your essentials organized. Features 8 card slots, two cash compartments, and an ID window, all wrapped in premium textured leather.
product_page.feature_resolution: RFID Blocking, Hand-Stitched, Slim Profile.
